study.title: Microbial communities of Corvallis and Clatskanie Populus trichocarpa Common Gardens
study.description: Common gardens at Corvallis and Clatskanie were used to assess microbiome diversity in the rhizosphere, endosphere and soil between Populus trichocarpa individual clones
